title: aethusa cynapium subsp. gigantea
intro: Aethusa cynapium subsp. gigantea, also known as tall hemlock or giant hemlock, is a subspecies of the Aethusa cynapium plant, a species of flowering plant in the carrot family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion, reduce inflammation, and act as a diuretic. The health benefits of Aethusa cynapium subsp. gigantea include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as indigestion and bloating, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and improve circulation. Herbal preparations of Aethusa cynapium subsp. gigantea include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
